content.text:
## Task: Delete IFileServiceContractTests.cs (tautological reflection tests)
## Step: review

Delete the file `TestProject.Tests/Services/IFileServiceContractTests.cs` in its entirety. It contains 12 reflection-based tests asserting on IFileService and FileService shape (namespace, kind, constructor and method signatures). All of these are compiler-enforced — the interface contract is enforced by the C# compiler the moment FileService claims to implement IFileService. The actual behavior is covered by `FileServiceTests.cs`. Do not modify any other file. Verification: `dotnet build TestProject.sln` succeeds; `dotnet test TestProject.Tests/TestProject.Tests.csproj` passes.

## Response Format (required)
Respond with ONLY a single valid JSON object matching the schema below.
- No prose, explanations, or commentary before or after the JSON.
- No markdown code fences (```), no headings — output the raw JSON object.
- Do NOT call any tools and do NOT end your turn on a thinking block. Emit the JSON object directly as text.

JSON schema:
{ approved: Whether the implementation is accepted, feedback: Detailed review feedback, issues: Array<{ file: File with the issue, description: What needs to be fixed, severity: "critical" | "minor" /* How important the fix is */ }> }
